judge_scores.reasoning: The response incorrectly attributes the first minimum age reform to the Fernando Henrique Cardoso government instead of the Bolsonaro government.
The response incorrectly attributes the first minimum age reform to the FHC government instead of Bolsonaro's 2019 reform.

The response incorrectly attributes the main pension reform establishing minimum retirement ages to Fernando Henrique Cardoso's EC 20/1998, when the ground truth clearly states it was Bolsonaro's EC 103/2019 that first established mandatory minimum ages (65 for men, 62 for women) in the General Social Security system.
